title: bromus scheuchzeri
intro: Bromus scheuchzeri, also known as Scheuchzer's brome or Alpine bromegrass, is a species of grass native to the mountainous regions of Europe. This perennial plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and diuretic effects. The health benefits of Bromus scheuchzeri include its potential to alleviate symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation in the body, and aid in the treatment of kidney stones. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, and are often used to support kidney and urinary health.
